ProfileSticker.title: Profile Sticker
ProfileSticker.description: Profile Sticker is a web app that allows a user to add a sticker from different themes to their profile picture. The user can choose to upload a picture from and download to a computer or Facebook.
ProfileSticker.imageDescription: Add a sticker to your profile picture using Profile Sticker in just 4 easy steps.
ProfileSticker.preview: Add a sticker to your profile picture using Profile Sticker in just …

RecipyBot.title: The Recipy Bot
RecipyBot.description: The Recipy Bot is my first attempt at making a bot for Facebook Messenger and Skype coupled with artificial intelligence using DialogFlow. Visit the website to add the bot to your contact list and start chatting.
RecipyBot.imageDescription: The Recipy Bot helps you cook delicious meals by picking the best recipie for you.
RecipyBot.preview: The Recipy Bot helps you cook delicious meals by picking the best …

SassSnippetPackVS.title: Sass Snippet Pack
SassSnippetPackVS.description: A snippet pack to help you write scss code. This adds a code snippet pack in the code snippet manager of Visual Studio.
SassSnippetPackVS.imageDescription: A snippet pack to help you write scss code. This adds a code snippet pack in the code snippet manager of Visual Studio.
SassSnippetPackVS.preview: A snippet pack to help you write scss code. This adds a code snippet …

TheChameleon.title: The Chameleon
TheChameleon.description: The Chameleon is an experiment with building a themeable website and using SCSS - a preprocessor for CSS - to the fullest.
TheChameleon.imageDescription: Just like a chameleon, this website can change colour. Use the theme picker to see it in action.
TheChameleon.preview: Just like a chameleon, this website can change colour.
